name: 20.2oz Glass Ribbed Cassin Tall Tumbler - Threshold™
description:
Serve cold drinks in style with the 20.2-Ounce Glass Ribbed Cassin Tall Tumbler from Threshold™. This tall tumbler features a ribbed design with a round base for a textured look. Made of glass, this Cassin tumbler is dishwasher safe for easy cleanup after use.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
